articles.title: Forget Walmart, Here’s The Real Reason Why Bitcoin Crashed
articles.description: Just another Monday for Bitcoin as the market rallied and immediately crashed over a fake Litecoin partnership with Walmart. BTC’s price turned green quickly after as it came out of a sideways weekend. At the time of writing, Bitcoin and other major cryptocurrencies record small losses. BTC’s price trades at $44,669 with a 2.5% and 13.4% loss in daily and weekly charts, respectively. Analyst...

articles.title: Litecoin Surges Then Crashes on Fake Walmart News
Breaking: Walmart Denies Litecoin Payments Rumours
articles.description: Litecoin recorded a 35% and 28.6% profit in the 1-hour and 24-hour charts, respectively, after major mainstream media websites reported a fake LTC integration into Walmart e-commerce stores. According to the fake press release, the company was going to allow its “millions of shoppers” to leverage crypto payments with LTC. The fake Litecoin integration was […]

articles.title: Litecoin Surges 30% In One Hour Following News Of Walmart Partnership
articles.description: Litecoin has recorded massive price movement in the past hour. The coin started to rally after Reuters had reported that retail giant Walmart would begin accepting the cryptocurrency as payment for purchases. The news broke on Monday with a press release that stated Walmart had partnered with Litecoin to allows customers to make payments with LTC. The news triggered a price surge that saw the...

articles.title: Iran closes down more unauthorized crypto mining farms: reports
articles.description: Iran, which imposed a temporary ban on Bitcoin mining a few months ago, continues to crack down on illegal crypto mining operations, closing down thousands of unauthorized mining facilities, according to local media reports.
